name: crouton-kit
description: Personal Claude Code plugins for development workflows

plugins.name: devcore
plugins.description: Core development agents and code quality hooks

plugins.name: learn
plugins.description: Interactive learning commands to help users understand code deeply

plugins.name: git-smart
plugins.description: Smart git commits with security and quality review

plugins.name: knowledge-capture
plugins.description: Requirements gathering, interviews, and learning commands

plugins.name: rpi
plugins.description: Feature development workflow: arch → plan → implement → review → fix

plugins.name: web
plugins.description: Web development tools including frontend design workflows

plugins.name: hookify
plugins.description: Create configurable hooks from markdown rule files

plugins.name: linear
plugins.description: Linear CLI integration — context injection, skill reference, and issue management

plugins.name: authoring
plugins.description: Guides for authoring Claude Code artifacts — CLAUDE.md, hooks, rules, skills, commands, and scripts

plugins.name: ai-cli
plugins.description: CLI tool for running Claude Code SDK sessions with configurable modes

plugins.name: capture
plugins.description: Generic app state capture — screenshots, HAR, console, logs via CDP

plugins.name: ai-workflow
plugins.description: Multi-step agent workflows — chain headless ai-cli runs with branching and Linear integration

plugins.name: sisyphus
plugins.description: Slash commands for sisyphus multi-agent orchestration

plugins.name: social
plugins.description: X (Twitter) posting, engagement, and growth tools — skills, commands, and northlight integration

plugins.name: termrender
plugins.description: Rich terminal rendering of directive-flavored markdown with tmux side pane support
